name: 街头士兵 | 凤凰战士
nameZh: 街头士兵 | 凤凰战士
descriptionEn: A Phoenix ground force gang with expertise in high density urban environments. Their knowledge of back roads and alleyways are only surpassed by local taxi drivers, which are rumored to make up a significant portion of their numbers. I know a shortcut.
descriptionZh: 他们是凤凰组织的地面力量，对楼房林立的都市环境了若指掌。他们对于偏僻道路或小街小巷的了解可能只有当地出租车司机才能比肩，然而据说，出租车司机也是帮派成员，而且占比也不小。 我知道一条捷径。
